title: ucase-marker-v1
description: A single parsed in-code use-case marker (the `ucase-marker-v1` shape). Markers carry identity ONLY: a start (begin) or `end` marker for a slug at a physical source location. The slug grammar and the row/binding distinction follow the marker grammar (spec 1.2/1.3); the const ids mirror packages/core/src/markers/constants.ts.

marker_schema_id.description: Identity-only marker schema id (MARKER_SCHEMA_ID in constants.ts).

kind.description: start = a begin marker (`<prefix>: @use-case: <slug>`); end = `<prefix>: @use-case: end <slug>`.

slug.description: The full marker slug: row-id with an optional `#binding-suffix`.

row_id.description: The row-id portion of the slug (the part before any `#`).

suffix.description: The binding-suffix after `#`, or null for a bare row-id marker.

role.description: row = a bare row-id slug (no suffix); binding = the slug carries a `#suffix`.

file.description: Workspace-relative POSIX path of the file the marker was found in.

line.description: 1-based physical line number of the marker.

column.description: 1-based column where the comment prefix begins.
